title: Impact of UK climate change risk on the delivery of education
body: "The adaptation committee’s independent assessment of UK climate risk sets out the priority climate change risks and opportunities for the UK.  The committee identified 3 key climate change risks as being likely to have an impact on education. These were:   overheating flooding water scarcity   In response, DfE has carried out an initial assessment of those risks. We made a commitment to understand such risks in our sustainability and climate change strategy.  "
